summary: Comprehensive UI testing of EcoSphere ESG Management Platform (frontend-only React + Zustand + localStorage). Verified authentication with all 3 demo accounts, dashboard, sidebar navigation, Carbon Transactions add flow, CSR approval, Compliance issue creation with overdue badge, Kanban view, Challenges join, Rewards redeem (with disabled Out-of-Stock), Leaderboard 'You' highlight, all 5 report pages export (CSV), Settings/ESG weight sliders + save + reset-demo, Notifications drawer + Mark All Read, Role Switcher, localStorage persistence across reload, and mobile responsive (390x844). All major functional flows PASSED. No blockers found.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option> due to tooling annotations (x-file-name/x-line-number injected into <option>). Hydration warning only, functionality unaffected.
Radix warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` on DialogContent — accessibility warning. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to dialog components for a11y.

action_items: Optional: Fix a11y warning on Radix DialogContent by adding DialogDescription (or aria-describedby={undefined}) for New Transaction, New Emission Factor, and Raise Issue dialogs.
Optional: Ensure select <option> elements don't receive dev tool annotation spans (this comes from the build-time source-mapping) — hydration warning only.
critical_code_review_comments: src/pages/environmental/index.jsx has ~296 lines with 5 exports (Overview, Transactions, EmissionFactors, Goals, Products). Manageable but consider splitting per page if it grows.
Zustand persist key 'ecosphere-store' works well; verified live persistence across reload (CT-0021 with qty=55 kWh, emission=45.1 remained after reload).
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes matching the documented conventions — great testability.
seed_data_creation: Added a test Carbon Transaction (CT-0021, qty=100, Grid Electricity, emission=82.0) and later (qty=55, emission=45.1). Approved 1 CSR participation. Raised 1 Compliance issue (CI-011 - OVERDUE). Joined 1 challenge. Redeemed 1 reward (Eco Water Bottle). All persisted in localStorage.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App base URL: https://esg-platform-demo.preview.emergentagent.com (frontend/.env). Sonner toasts use [data-sonner-toast] selector, appear top-right. Radix Dialog components have accessibility warnings (missing DialogDescription) - not blocking. Emission Factor add dialog has hydration warning due to <span> inside <option> from build-time source annotations. All tested demo accounts work. Note: Notifications 'Mark All Read' does not fire a toast (by design) — badge just clears. Kanban view works on /governance/compliance. Rewards page has both enabled and disabled (Out of Stock) redeem buttons. Persistence tested and verified across page reload within same session.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no blocking issues found. Two minor a11y/hydration console warnings noted but do not impact functionality.
